# Daily Report — 2026-07-04

## Task Completed
Added `get_ci_class_schema` tool (GET sys_dictionary records for a CI class).
Queries the ServiceNow `sys_dictionary` table to return the full field schema for any CMDB CI class:
field name (`element`), display label, data type (`internal_type`), mandatory flag, read-only flag,
max length, default value, and reference table for reference fields. Supports `mandatory_only=true`
to filter to required fields, and `include_inherited=true` to also pull base `cmdb_ci` fields.
Results are sorted: mandatory fields first, then alphabetically. Registered in `system_administrator`
and `full` packages.

- Total tests: 2024
- Coverage: 93%
- All passing: yes
- New tests: 22 (test_get_ci_class_schema.py)

pip-audit flagged environment-level dependencies only (setuptools, urllib3, wheel) — not project code.
